summary: Iteration 95: Testing Directed Studio v3 Pipeline Rewrite - Per-scene parallel teams architecture. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified DirectedStudio component loads correctly with project list, new project form, and campaign type selector. Code review confirmed new scene statuses (queued, directing, waiting_sora, generating_video, done, error) with correct color coding.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: v3 pipeline uses per-scene parallel teams with _scene_team() function - SceneDirector(Claude) → Sora 2 per scene
studio.py: Sora 2 rate-limited by semaphore (max 5 concurrent) via sora_semaphore = threading.Semaphore(5)
studio.py: _update_scene_status() updates scene_status dict with new states: queued, directing, waiting_sora, generating_video, done, error
studio.py: _save_scene_video() saves completed scene videos immediately for real-time preview
DirectedStudio.jsx: Scene cards show proper states with color coding - purple=directing, blue=waiting_sora, gold=generating_video, green=done, red=error
DirectedStudio.jsx: Scene preview video player (data-testid='scene-preview-{num}') appears for completed scenes
DirectedStudio.jsx: Time estimate shows ~X min based on scenes/5 batches formula: Math.ceil(scenes.length / 5) * 8 + 1
StudioProductionBanner.jsx: Updated phase labels for v3 - 'Dirigindo cenas...', 'Aguardando Sora 2...', 'Iniciando equipas...'
StudioProductionBanner.jsx: Scene mini-indicators show done/error/agents_done states with color coding
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects for API testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Directed Studio v3 pipeline uses per-scene parallel teams. Each scene gets its own thread: SceneDirector(Claude) → Sora 2. Sora 2 limited by semaphore (max 5 concurrent). Test user has 0 projects in DirectedStudio. Completed project b4435a8658b4 exists with 2 scenes and status 'complete'. DO NOT trigger full production (costs API credits). Scene statuses: queued (gray), directing (purple), waiting_sora (blue), generating_video (gold), done (green), error (red).

backend_api_tests.Completed project b4435a8658b4: PASS - Returns status='complete' with video outputs

frontend_ui_tests.New project form: PASS - data-testid='new-project-form' with name/desc inputs and create button
